category.description: The milestone category. This will be present only when a milestone is in a COMPLETE state.

current.description: The indication if the milestone represents the current state of the package. Valid values: 'true' this milestone is the current state of the package.  'false' this milestone is not current.

description.description: The milestone description. Note: this is not translated at this time and is returned in US English.

linkedActivity.description: The 0-based index of the activity that triggered this milestone. This will be returned only when a milestone is in a COMPLETE state. For example the most recent activity on the response is index 0.

state.description: The milestone state. Valid values: 'This milestone has already occurred'/'This milestone has not yet been completed'.

Tracking_Milestones.description: The list of milestones associated with the package. Milestones will be returned in chronological order, with the oldest first and most recent/future milestones last.

additionalAttributes.description: The list of additional attributes that may be associated with the package. Presence of any element indicates the package has that attribute.

additionalServices.description: The list of additional services that may be associated with the package. Presence of any element indicates that the package has that service.

isSmartPackage.description: Indicator of whether the package is a smart package

packageCount.description: The total number of packages in the shipment. Note that this number may be greater than the number of returned packages in the response. In such cases subsequent calls are needed to get additional packages.

statusDescription.description: The activity status description. Note: this field will be translated based on the locale provided in the request.

suppressionIndicators.description: Contains values which signify that certain data should be suppressed or hidden. Valid values: Tracking activity details should be hidden. Note: this is mainly intended for use by UPS.com applications.

ucixStatus.description: This indicator provides UCIX (UPS Customer Information Exchange) status Valid values: 'O' means open. 'C' means closed.

Tracking_PackageAddress.title: PackageAddress

attentionName.description: The specific name of an individual associated with the address segment.

type.description: The type of address.

Tracking_PackageAddress.description: The container array that has all the addresses associated with the package, such as the ship from (shipper), ship to (consignee), and delivery addresses

Tracking_PaymentInformation.title: PaymentInformation

amount.description: The payment amount. This value will contain the amount in dollars and cents, separated by a period (.) Example: '1025.50'.9

currency.description: The payment currency code (see API codes for possible values).

id.description: The payment internal ID. This may be used in other systems to retrieve additional information on the payment.

paid.description: The indication for whether the payment is paid or not. Valid values: 'true' the payment is paid. 'false' the payment is not paid.

type.description: The payment type.

Tracking_PaymentInformation.description: The container array that has all the payment information associated with the package, such as 'Collect on Delivery payment'.

Tracking_ReferenceNumber.title: ReferenceNumber

type.description: The type of reference number. Specifies how the reference number is associated with the package.

Tracking_ReferenceNumber.description: The list of reference numbers associated with the package.

Tracking_Service.title: Service

description.description: The service name description. Note that this field will be translated based on the locale provided in the request.

Tracking_Service.description: The container which has the package service information.

userRelation.description:
The relationship of the user to the package(s) in the shipment. No value means that the user has no relationship to the package. Note that this check is only done when the request contains the 'Username' and package rights checking is performed. Valid values:
'MYC_HOME' - My Choice for Home
'MYC_BUS_OUTBOUND' - My Choice for Business Outbound
'MYC_BUS_INBOUND' - My Choice for Business Inbound
'SHIPPER' - Shipper

Tracking_Signature.title: Signature

image.description: The base64 encoded string representation of the signature image. Note: This is considered sensitive data and may only be returned for a user that has rights to the package.

Tracking_Signature.description: Container with all the signature information associated to the package being delivered.

Tracking_Status.title: Status

description.description: The current status description. Note that this field will be translated based on the locale provided in the request.
description.example: Your package was released by the customs agency.

simplifiedTextDescription.description: The current status in simplified text. This is a supplementary description providing additional information on the status of the package. Note that this field will be translated based on the locale provided in the request.

statusCode.description: The activity package detail status code see API Codes for possible values.

type.description: The activity status type.

Tracking_Status.description: The container which has the current package status

Tracking_SubMilestone.title: SubMilestone
Tracking_SubMilestone.description: The sub-milestone container containing information on a child milestone. Will be present only if a child milestone exists.

Tracking_Weight.title: Weight

unitOfMeasurement.description: The weight units of measurement. Valid values: 'LBS' - pounds. 'KGS' - kilograms.

weight.description: The weight units of measurement. Valid values: 'LBS' - pounds. 'KGS' - kilograms.

Tracking_Weight.description: The weight container for the package.

accountNumber.description: The UPS account number of the shipper to be used to clouseout shipment.

shipper.description: Contains the account number to be used in closeout request.

packages.description: The list of packages in the shipment.

shipment.description: Contains all the details of the shipment.

invoiceLabelResponse.description: Contains the response details for the generated invoice label, including the format and data of the generated document.

bolLabelResponse.description: Contains the response details for the generated Bill of Lading (BOL) label, including the format and data of the generated document.

palletLabelResponses.description: A list of responses for the generated pallet labels, each containing details such as the label number and the base64 encoded data.

files.description: A list of generated document files.

DocGenerationResponse.description: Contains the details of the generated document files, such as the invoices, bill of lading and pallet labels.

data.description: The base64 encoded data of the generated document.

fileFormat.description: The format of the generated document file.

referenceId.description: The unique reference identifier for the generated document.

DocGenerationFile.description: Contains the details of a generated document file.

numberOfIdenticalUnits.description: Number of identical units in the package/ltl.

type.description: The type of handling unit, such as boxes, crates, or pallets, used to describe how the shipment is packaged and handled.

freightClass.description:
Freight class of the handling unit.
| Code  | Description                                                                              |
| :--:  | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------: |
| 50    | over 50 lbs - Fits on standard shrink-wrapped 4X4 pallet, very durable                   |
| 55    | 35-50 pounds - Bricks, cement, mortar, hardwood flooring                                 |
| 60    | 30-35 pounds - Car accessories & car parts                                               |
| 65    | 22.5-30 pounds - Car accessories & car parts, bottled beverages, books in boxes          |
| 70    | 15 to 22.5 pounds - Car accessories & car parts, food items, automobile engines          |
| 77.5  | 13.5 to 15 pounds - Tires, bathroom fixtures                                             |
| 85    | 12-13.5 pounds - Crated machinery, cast iron stoves                                      |
| 92.5  | 10.5-12 pounds - Computers, monitors, refrigerators                                      |
| 100   | 9-10.5 pounds - Boat covers, car covers, canvas, wine cases, caskets                     |
| 110   | 8-9 pounds - Cabinets, framed artwork, table saw                                         |
| 125   | 7-8 pounds - Small Household appliances                                                  |
| 150   | 6-7 pounds - Auto sheet metal parts, bookcases                                           |
| 175   | 5-6 pounds - Clothing, couches stuffed furniture                                         |
| 200   | 4-5 pounds - Auto sheet metal parts, aircraft parts, aluminum table, packaged mattresses |
| 250   | 3-4 pounds - Bamboo furniture, mattress and box spring, plasma TV                        |
| 300   | 2-3 pounds - Wood cabinets, tables, chairs setup, model boats                            |
| 400   | 1-2 pounds - Deer antlers                                                                |
| 500   | Less than 1 lbs - Bags of gold dust, ping pong balls                                     |

airService.description: Number of packages for air service. If groundService is 0, this must be at least 1.

groundService.description: Number of packages for ground service. If airService is 0, this must be at least 1.

transportationService.description: Specifies the transportation service options for the handling unit, including the number of packages for air and ground services.

HandlingUnits.description: Used to provide information about the handling units in the package/ltl.

unitOfMeasurement.description:
Unit of measurement of the weight.
| Code  | Description |
| :--:  | :--         |
| KGS   | Kilograms   |
| LBS   | Pounds      |

The code associated with unit of measurement. The requested code must be valid for the shipper country or territory.
| Code  | Description |
| :--:  | :--         |
| IN    | Inches      |
| CM    | Centimeters |

files.description: A list of generated Label files.

TradeDirect_LabelResponse.description: Contains either a warning message or the label response files.

opTyp.description:
Image format type for the label requested by customer.
| Code   | Description   |
| :----: | :-----------: |
| ZPL    | ZPL format    |
| EPL    | EPL format    |
| STARPL | STARPL format |
| SPL    | SPL format    |
| PNG    | PNG format    |
| PDF    | PDF format    |
| GIF    | GIF format    |

lblNmbr.description: The unique label number assigned to the generated label.

lblData.description: The base64 encoded data of the generated label.

LabelDetails.description: Contains the response details for a label generation request.

requestedDoc.description:
The type of document requested for generation.
| Code   | Description                     |
| :----: | :-----------------------------: |
| CCI    | Consolidated Commercial Invoice |
| CBOL   | Consolidated Bill of Lading     |
| BOL    | Bill of Lading                  |
| PLT    | Pallet Label                    |
| PKGPLT | Package Pallet Label            |

docFormat.description:
Image format type for the label requested by customer.
| Code   | Description   |
| :----: | :-----------: |
| ZPL    | ZPL format    |
| EPL    | EPL format    |
| STARPL | STARPL format |
| SPL    | SPL format    |
| PNG    | PNG format    |
| PDF    | PDF format    |
| GIF    | GIF format    |

usiNumber.description: The unique shipment identifier (USI) is used to create Master, LTL and Child shipments. Used for Freight shipments.

shipperAccountNumber.description: The UPS account number of the shipper that was used in clouseout shipment.

subproNumber.description: A unique tracking number used for LTL shipments.

DocumentRequest.description: Request payload containing shipment details required to generate documents

cci.description: Contains the generated Consolidated Commercial Invoice (CCI) document. Document will be PDF format and base64 encoded. See base64-data-samples document for sample.

cbol.description: Contains the generated Consolidated Bill of Lading (CBOL) document. Document will be PDF format and base64 encoded. See base64-data-samples document for sample.

bol.description: Contains the generated Bill of Lading (BOL) document. Document will be PDF format and base64 encoded. See base64-data-samples document for sample.

plt.description: Contains the generated Pallet Label (PLT) documents. Labels will contain format requested by client and be base64 encoded. See base64-data-samples document for sample.

pkgplt.description: Contains the generated Packge Pallet Labels (PKGPLT) documents. Labels will contain format requested by client and be base64 encoded. See base64-data-samples document for sample.

DocumentResponse.description: Response payload containing the generated documents

WarningMessage.description: A warning message that may be returned if the document is not generated successfully.
WarningMessage.example: Use Document API to generate missing documents.

errors.description: error payload - array containing one or more Errors

TradeDirect_Error.description: The error entity that contains the code and description of an error.

CommodityId.description: The commodity ID returned in the Import Export Compliance report.

categoryType.description: Whether the compliance assessment regards imports or exports

ComplianceDetails.description: This object contains details of specific compliance requirements and controls that are applicable to the shipment, based on whether it is for import or export purposes.

controlDetailName.description:
The formal name or title of the control measure. This property serves as the header for `ControlDetails`.  Where no specific control name is applicable, this field may be left empty (and consequently, no header will be displayed in the response). This property is translated to the user's language as required. 

**Note**: When the `controlTypeCode` is set to `DOC`, the `controlDetailName` is also the identifier for the corresponding DocuSign template.

controlDetailDescription.description: A detailed description of the control measure, translated for the user as required.

ControlDetails.description: This object contains an array of warning messages related to this control type.

controlType.description: The category of customs control applicable to the shipment. This property is translated to the user's language as required.

controlTypeCode.description: A unique code that distinctly identifies each control type. This code is not translated and is used for specific system-logic related to the control type.

isRequired.description: Whether shipment compliance with a specific control type is required

controlTypeMessage.description: Additional guidance or instructions based on the specific control type condition.

controlDetails.description: An array that contains a list of control types and codes

ControlTypes.description: This object includes specific type of customs controls applicable to a shipment.

CountryCodes.description: The two-letter identification code for countries.

CurrencyCodes.description:
The three-letter code that represents the currency used to value the items in the shipment. | Supported enum values | | :--------------------------- | | `ARS`
Argentine Peso | | `AUD`
Australian Dollar | | `BRL`
Brazilian Real | | `CAD`
Canadian Dollar | | `CHF`
Swiss Franc | | `CLP`
Chilean Peso | | `CNY`
Chinese Yuan | | `CRC`
Costa Rican Colon | | `DKK`
Danish Krone | | `DOP`
Dominican Peso | | `EUR`
Euro | | `GBP`
Great Britain Pound | | `HKD`
Hong Kong Dollar | | `INR`
India Rupee | | `JPY`
Japanese Yen | | `KRW`
Korean Won | | `MXN`
Mexican Peso | | `MYR`
Malaysian Ringgit | | `NOK`
Norwegian Kroner | | `NZD`
New Zealand Dollar | | `PEN`
Peruvian Nuevo Sol | | `PHP`
Philippine Peso | | `PLN`
Polish Zloty | | `SEK`
Swedish Krona | | `SGD`
Singapore Dollar | | `THB`
Thai Baht | | `TWD`
Taiwan Dollar | | `USD`
US Dollar | | `VEB`
Venezuelan Bolivar |

isMatched.description: Whether the description guidance service has matched a keyword from the shipment description

message.description: A message with guidance on how to improve the shipment description

sourceListName.description: A list of terminology used to describe items from a particular regional source

matchedKeyword.description: The keyword(s) from the shipment description that matched the system criteria

DescriptionGuidanceResponse.description: This object contains the system's results to a request for Description Guidance

UPSExportAssure_ErrorResponse.description: This object is the primary container for error responses.

ErrorResponseWrapper.description: This object contains an array of error codes.

field.description: The path to the field causing the error as returned from the API backend services

value.description: The value that caused the error

type.description:
Specific operation the error message is relevant to. | Supported enum values | | :------------------------------------- | | `DG`
Description Guidance | | `POA`
Power of Attorney Requirement | | `IEC`
Import Export Compliance |

ErrorCode.description: This object contains error codes, error descriptions and other error properties.

EvaluationCriteria.description:
Criteria for evaluating POA requirements for both importer and exporter. Supported values: | Supported enum values | | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `NonConditional`
Standard evaluation without specific conditional criteria | | `Description`
Evaluation based on the detailed description of the commodity | | `FTA`
Free Trade Agreement. Evaluation considers Free Trade Agreement stipulations applicable to the shipment. | | `Value`
Evaluation based on the monetary value of the commodities | | `HTS`
Harmonized Tariff Schedule. Evaluation uses HTS codes for tariff classification and compliance | | `Quantity`
Evaluation focuses on the quantity of the goods being shipped | | `Weight`
Evaluation based on the weight of the shipment |

transID.description: The unique, reference identifier that correlates an API request with its response

evaluateDescriptions.description: Whether the user has requested description guidance

evaluatePoaRequirements.description: Whether the user has requested Power of Attorney (POA) requirements

evaluateAdvancedImportExportRequirements.description: Whether the user has requested an Advanced Import/Export Compliance review

evaluateImportExportRequirements.description: Whether the user has requested an Import/Export Compliance review

ExportAssureRequest.description: This object is the primary request structure for the Export Assure API.

ExportAssureResponse.description: This object is the primary request container for the Export Assure API.

ExportAssurePartialResponse.description: This object is the primary response container for the Export Assure API.

HsCode.description: The [Harmonized System (HS) code](https://www.trade.gov/harmonized-system-hs-codes). Used commonly throughout the export process for goods, the Harmonized System is a standardized numerical method of classifying traded products. It is used by customs authorities to identify products when assessing duties and taxes.

shipmentValue.description: The total monetary value of all items included in the shipment

hasShipmentWarnings.description: Whether there are shipment-level warning. Shipment-level warnings include issues related to documentation and shipment packaging.

hasCommodityWarnings.description: Whether there are compliance-related warnings or issues at the commodity level within the shipment. A `true` value indicates potential compliance concerns that require the shipper's attention.

commodityWarningsMessage.description: The warning message returned when the `hasCommodityWarnings` flag is set to true

isShipmentOverGiftValueThreshold.description: Whether the total value of the shipment exceeds the allowable threshold for categorizing it as a gift

shipmentOverGiftValueThresholdMessage.description: The message returned if the shipment's value surpasses the threshold for gift categorization

isShipmentOverGiftWeightThreshold.description: Whether the total weight of the shipment exceeds the weight limit for being classified as a gift

shipmentOverGiftWeightThresholdMessage.description: A message explaining the implications if the shipment's weight goes beyond the threshold for gift categorization, guiding users in understanding customs considerations.

ImportExportShipmentLevelResponse.description: This object contains properties which describe the shipment's compliance with laws and regulations.

isUpsProhibited.description: Whether UPS prohibits shipment of the item

upsProhibitedMessage.description: A message explaining the reason for any prohibited shipment

isTranslatedIndicator.description: Whether shipment details have been translated from the language of the origin country to the user's language

complianceOutput.description: This array includes the output of the compliance review, including customs category and control codes.

ImportExportItemLevelResponse.description: This object includes details of the Import Export Compliance assessment.

importerPoaRequiredFlag.description: Whether Power of Attorney (POA) is required for the importer

importerPoaOnFileIndicator.description: Whether the importer already has a POA on file

importerCommodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity regarding what led to the POA requirement for the importer

exporterPoaRequiredFlag.description: Whether the exporter is required to provide a POA for customs clearance.

exporterPoaOnFileIndicator.description: Whether the exporter has a POA already on file

exporterCommodityDescription.description: The commodity that triggers the POA requirement for the exporter

exporterOnlineFormFlag.description: Whether there is an online form available for the exporter to complete their POA documentation

exporterDocuSignTemplateId.description: The ID of the DocuSign template, which the exporter can use for electronic completion of the POA.

PowerOfAttorneyResponse.description: This object includes details of the Power of Attorney (POA) requirements for the shipment.

importerCity.description: The city where the importer is located. Required if both importer's account number and importer's zip code are not provided and POA evaluation is requested.

importerZipcode.description: The postal code of the importer's location. Required when the importer's account number and city are not specified and POA evaluation is requested.

importerAccountNumber.description: The UPS account number of the importer

exporterName.description: The name of the exporter. Required when the exporter's UPS account number is not available and POA requirements are under review.

exporterCity.description: The city from which the exporter operates. Required if exporter's account number and zip code are not given and POA evaluation is requested.

exporterZipcode.description: The postal code of the exporter's location. Required when exporter's account number and city are not provided and POA evaluation is requested.

exporterAccountNumber.description: The UPS account number of the exporter

transModes.description:
Mode of transportation for the shipment. | Supported enum values | |---------------------------------------------| | `INT_AIR`
International Air Freight | | `INT_OCEAN`
International Ocean Freight | | `INT_RAIL`
International Rail Freight | | `INT_TRUCK`
International Truck Freight | | `DOM_AIR`
Domestic Air Freight | | `DOM_OCEAN`
Domestic Ocean Freight | | `DOM_RAIL`
Domestic Rail Freight | | `DOM_TRUCK`
Domestic Truck Freight |

shipmentType.description:
Shipment type. | Supported enum values | | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `GIFT`
Items sent as gifts, typically for personal reasons. | | `COMM`
Commercial goods or commodities, usually for business transactions. Sale, sample, repair. | | `OTHR`
Return, Other, and Intercompany Data, Anything else not supported. | | `PERS`
Personal items, often for relocation or personal use |

shipmentDescription.description: Description of the contents of the shipment. This description is required if the `evaluateDescriptions` flag is set to true.

grossWeight.description: The gross weight of the entire Shipment. If this field is not specified, `grossWeightUnit` must be `null`.

grossWeightUnit.description: Gross weight unit. Only required if there is a value for `grossWeight`; If `grossWeight` is not specified, this value must equal `null`.

UPSExportAssure_ShipmentRequest.description: This object contains all necessary details about a shipment for compliance evaluation.

hasCommodityWarnings.description: Whether there are compliance-related warnings or issues at the commodity level within the shipment. A `true` value indicates potential compliance concerns that require the shipper's attention.

UPSExportAssure_ShipmentResponse.description: This object contains metadata about the shipment and includes the response objects for each of the three operations.

ShipmentId.description: A unique identifier assigned to the shipment as part of the API's compliance review process.

eccn.description: The [US Export Commodity Control Number (ECCN)](https://www.bis.doc.gov/index.php/licensing/commerce-control-list-classification/export-control-classification-number-eccn)a key identifier used in the export control system.

description.description: A description of the shipment item listed in the request.

amountValue.description: Total value of the items in the shipment.

quantity.description: The total number of items shipped.

UOM.description: The unit of measurement for the quantity of shipment items

ShipmentItemsRequest.description: This object provides a detailed response for each individual commodity within a shipment

description.description: A description of the shipment item listed in the request.

ShipmentItemsResponse.description: This object provides a detailed response for each individual commodity within a shipment

TransactionID.description: The unique, reference identifier that correlates an API request with its response

TranslationLocale.description:
Translation locale. | Supported enum values | | :------------------------- | | `EN`
English | | `DE`
Germany | | `PL`
Polish | | `FR`
French | | `IT`
Italian | | `NL`
Dutch | | `ES`
Spanish | | `ZH`
Simplified Chinese |

absLayerTime.description: Time taken through the abstraction layer in milliseconds.

x-api-success-count.description: Indicate the number of charges for the API call.

UPSExportAssure_SuccessResponseHeaders.description: The headers that are returned for all error responses.

GatewayErrorResponseHeaders.description: The headers returned from the gateway

url.description:
It is an HTTPS-based callback end point that is exposed by the client to receive event notification. This endpoint must be operational around the clock to ensure no event notifications are missed.
If this endpoint is not continuously available, incoming events will be lost.

credentialType.description: It is an open-entry field that indicates type of credentials supported by the client.

credential.description: It is an opaque string meant for client authentication. If for any reason this credential changes then any event notification will fail until a new subscription is made.

Destination.description: The destination container related to the clients endpoint API. To which messages would be sent on an event on the package.

locale.description: Locale setting is composed of language code and country code, separated by an underscore. Currently only english US(en_US) is accepted.

countryCode.description: Represents the country code. This field is reserved for future use.

items.description: Represents tracking numbers starting with '1Z', followed by 16 alphanummeric characters in request, as well as tracking numbers starting with '1R', followed by 14 or 26 alphanumeric characters.

trackingNumberList.description: Represents list of tracking numbers in request.

message.example: Locale is required. The Subscription request has been rejected.

UPSTrackAlert_Ready_ErrorMessage.description: The error response containing any errors that occurred

validTrackingNumbers.description: List of tracking numbers with successful subscription created.

invalidTrackingNumbers.description: List of tracking numbers associated with errors preventing subscription creation.

errors.description: The error response containing any errors that occurred.

localActivityDate.description: The localized date of the activity. Format: YYYYMMDD

localActivityTime.description: The localized time of the activity. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr)

scheduledDeliveryDate.description: Original scheduled delivery date of the package. Format: YYYYMMDD

actualDeliveryDate.description: Actual delivery date of the package. Format: YYYYMMDD (This field is blank until the delivery event occurs)

actualDeliveryTime.description: Actual delivery time of the package. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr) (This field is blank until the delivery event occurs)

gmtActivityDate.description: The GMT date of the activity. Format: YYYYMMDD

gmtActivityTime.description: The GMT time of the activity. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr)

gmtOffset.description: A field that shows how local time was calculated. In the format (-/+)HH.MM (24 hr)

deliveryStartTime.description: The start time of a delivery. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr).

deliveryEndTime.description: The end time of a window or the committed time or the delivered time. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr)

deliveryTimeDescription.description: The date of this delivery detail.

stateProvince.description: The physical address state or province.

postalCode.description: The physical address postal code (This field is blank until the delivery event occurs).

ActivityLocation.description: The container which has the current package activity location.

type.description:
The current activity status type.

| Code  | Type                          |
| :--:  | :--                           |
| D     | Delivery                      |
| I     | On the Way                    |
| M     | Manifest                      | 
| MV    | Manifest Void                 | 
| U     | Updated Delivery Date or Time | 
| X     | Package Exception             |

code.description: The current activity status code. See the 'Status Codes' document for more details.

ActivityStatus.description: The container which has the current package activity status.

It is an HTTPS-based callback end point that is exposed by the client to receive event notification. This endpoint must be operational around the clock to ensure no event notifications are missed.
If this endpoint is not continuously available, incoming events will be lost.

credentialType.description: It is an open-entry field that indicates type of credentials supported by the client.

credential.description: It is an opaque string meant for client authentication. If for any reason this credential changes then any event notification will fail until a new subscription is made.

UPSTrackAlertEnhanced_Ready_Destination.description: The destination container related to the clients endpoint API. To which messages would be sent on an event on the package.

locale.description: Locale setting is composed of language code and country code, separated by an underscore. Currently only english US(en_US) is accepted.

countryCode.description: Represents the country code. This field is reserved for future use.

items.description: Represents tracking numbers starting with '1Z', followed by 16 alphanummeric characters in request.

trackingNumberList.description: Represents list of tracking numbers in request.

eventPreferences.description:
Represents scan/event preferences for the subscription endpoint. If no value is provided in this array
then all activity types will be sent.

message.example: Locale is required. The Subscription request has been rejected.

UPSTrackAlertEnhanced_Ready_ErrorMessage.description: The error response containing any errors that occurred

validTrackingNumbers.description: List of tracking numbers with successful subscription created.

invalidTrackingNumbers.description: List of tracking numbers associated with errors preventing subscription creation.

errors.description: The error response containing any errors that occurred.

localActivityDate.description: The localized date of the activity. Format: YYYYMMDD

localActivityTime.description: The localized time of the activity. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr)

scheduledDeliveryDate.description: Original scheduled delivery date of the package. Format: YYYYMMDD

actualDeliveryDate.description: Actual delivery date of the package. Format: YYYYMMDD (This field is blank until the delivery event occurs)

actualDeliveryTime.description: Actual delivery time of the package. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr) (This field is blank until the delivery event occurs)

gmtActivityDate.description: The GMT date of the activity. Format: YYYYMMDD

gmtActivityTime.description: The GMT time of the activity. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr)

deliveryStartTime.description: The start time of a delivery. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr).

deliveryEndTime.description: The end time of a window or the committed time or the delivered time. Format: HHMMSS (24 hr)

deliveryTimeDescription.description: The date of this delivery detail.

deliveryPhoto.description: Base64 encoded image of the delivery photo (This field is blank until the delivery photo is made available for enhanced subscriptions).

receivedBy.description: Clarified signature provided with delivery, when available.

stateProvince.description: The physical address state or province.

postalCode.description: The physical address postal code (This field is blank until the delivery event occurs).

BasicAuthGenerate.description:
- **Flow 1: Plain Auth-Code**

Find your Client ID and Secret on your app info page. 
 1. Select \"Try It\"
 2. In the Security section enter your Client ID as the Username and your Secret as the Password.
 3. Enter any additional information in the Body and Parameters sections.
 4. Select \"Send\" to execute your API request

 - **Flow 2: Auth-Code with PKCE [no http Authorization header required]**
 1. Select \"Try It\"
 2. Include the **client_id** and **code_verifier** parameters in the body of the request. Do not include an Authorization header.
 3. Enter any additional information in the Body and Parameters sections.
 4. Select \"Send\" to execute your API request

 1. Select "Try It"
 2. In the Security section enter your Client ID and Secret.
 3. Select \"Request Token\"
 4. Enter any additional information in the Body and Parameters sections.
 5. Select "Send" to execute your API request"

WorldEaseShipmentManagement_OAuth2.description:
Find your Client ID and Secret on your app info page. 
  1. Select "Try It" 
  2. In the Security section enter your Client ID and Secret 
  3. Select "Request Token"
  4. Enter any additional information in the Body and Parameters sections
  5. Select "Send" to execute your API request"
